headline: Anthropic, OpenAI's Next Models Could Be A 'Watershed' Event For Cybersecurity, Warns Expert—'Agentic Attackers Are Coming'
summary: Industry experts are warning of rising cybersecurity risks from AI agents, saying these tools can identify and exploit system vulnerabilities faster and more persistently than human hackers.
